title: carex × pilosiuscula
intro: Carex × pilosiuscula, also known as the false-hoary sedge, is a hybrid plant species in the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Carex × pilosiuscula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal medicine.
